title: dialium divaricatum
intro: Dialium divaricatum, also known as the African horse chestnut or the tree of heaven, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dialium divaricatum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and managing fever. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional medicine, typically in the form of a decoction or infusion.
